title: sclarea amplexicaulis
intro: Sclarea amplexicaulis, also known as spikenard, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic qualities. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep, and relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Sclarea amplexicaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils for internal and external use.
